name: Better Volume
description: like the alpha mod kinda but cooler :3c

enable-mod.name: Enable Mod
enable-mod.description: Toggles the mod on or off

input-precision.name: Input Precision
input-precision.description: How many decimal places to show in the input

swap-sliders.name: Swap Sliders
swap-sliders.description: Swaps the Music and SFX sliders

mute-button.name: Mute Button
mute-button.description: Adds a mute button next to the sliders

mute-button-on-right.name: Mute Button On Right
mute-button-on-right.description: Places the mute button on the right side of the slider

colored-bars.name: Colored Bars
colored-bars.description: Gives the slider bars a custom color

music-color.name: Music Color
music-color.description: Sets the color for the Music slider

sfx-color.name: SFX Color
sfx-color.description: Sets the color for the SFX slider

music-text.name: Custom Music Text
music-text.description: Custom text for the Music slider

sfx-text.name: Custom SFX Text
sfx-text.description: Custom text for the SFX slider
